summary: Loading state displays correctly with proper heading and mobile layout, but uses generic UI palette instead of required brand colors

violations.description: Page uses generic dark UI background instead of required diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea)
Signed-in admin interface uses neutral gray palette that should remain visually separated from public marketing chrome

actions: Verify loading state functionality meets screen spec requirements
Consider brand consistency guidelines for admin interface palette
